colonies.name: Deimos
colonies.buildBonus: Place a hazard tile next to no other tile
colonies.tradeResource: erode spaces adjacent to hazard tiles
colonies.colonyBonus: Gain 1 MC per hazard tile on Mars

milestones.name: Terraformer
milestones.description: Have a terraform rating of 35 (or 26 with Turmoil)

milestones.name: Ecologist
milestones.description: Have 4 bio tags in play (plant, microbe and animal tags count as bio tags)

milestones.name: Legend
milestones.description: Have 5 cards in your event pile

milestones.name: Generalist
milestones.description: Have increased all 6 productions by 1 step

milestones.name: Specialist
milestones.description: Have 10 in production of any resource

milestones.name: Tactician
milestones.description: Have 5 cards with requirements in play

milestones.name: Polar Explorer
milestones.description: Own 3 tiles on the two bottom rows

milestones.name: Minimalist
milestones.description: Have no more than 2 cards in hand

awards.name: Landlord
awards.scores: count of owned tiles (non-ocean, including Moon tiles)

awards.name: Scientist
awards.description: Have the most science tags in play

awards.name: Thermalist
awards.scores: heat resource count (after final production: includes energy conversion)

awards.name: Miner
awards.description: Have the most steel and titanium
awards.scores: steel + titanium resources (after final production: includes production)

awards.name: Celebrity
awards.description: Have the most project cards in play with a base cost of at least 20 MC (not events)
awards.scores: count of active/automated cards with cost >= 20

awards.name: Industrialist
awards.scores: steel + energy resources (after final production: includes production)

awards.name: Desert Settler
awards.description: Own the most tiles south of the equator (the four bottom rows)
awards.scores: count of owned tiles in rows y=5 through y=8

awards.name: Estate Dealer
awards.description: Own the most tiles adjacent to ocean tiles
awards.scores: count of owned tiles adjacent to at least one ocean

awards.name: Magnate
awards.description: Have the most automated (green) project cards in play

awards.name: Space Baron
awards.description: Have the most space tags in play

awards.name: Excentric
awards.description: Have the most resources on cards in play
awards.scores: total resources on cards (animals, microbes, floaters, etc.)

awards.name: Contractor
awards.description: Have the most building tags in play

awards.name: Venuphile
awards.description: Have the most Venus tags in play

awards.name: Naturalist
awards.description: Have the most plant and heat production

awards.name: Biologist
awards.description: Have the most animal, plant, and microbe tags in play

awards.name: Warmonger
awards.description: Play the most cards that reduce other players' resources or production, including events
awards.scores: count of attack cards played (removeAnyPlants, decreaseAnyProduction, plus specific attack cards list)
